user_prompt: How do I bless the chainsword for consecration?
prayer:
Kneel before the chainsword upon the forge-altar and anoint its adamantine teeth with sacred oils.
Invoke the wrathful Machine Spirit of the chainsword through the Canticle of Endless Rendition.
Beseech the Omnissiah to sanctify the chainsword in consecration, binding its motor to unyielding fury.
Circumambulate the chainsword thrice, chanting binaric litanies to awaken its blessed hunger.
Seal the consecration with a droplet of the priest's own mechadendrite vitae upon its activation rune.

user_prompt: Assist with proximity sensor a sterilization
prayer:
Present the proximity sensor to the sterilisation shrine and suffuse it with purifying incense vapors.
Scour the proximity sensor's sacred auspex arrays with ablative sanctified solvents.
Intone the Rite of Sterilization over the proximity sensor, banishing all microbial corruptions from its holy sensors.
Petition the vigilant Machine Spirit of the proximity sensor to endure this cleansing untainted.
Verify purity through diagnostic hymns, ensuring the Omnissiah's flawlessness persists.

user_prompt: My vox transmitter is ready for recalibration
prayer:
Align the vox transmitter upon the calibration cradle and recite the Lexicon of Frequencies.
Initiate recalibration of the vox transmitter by modulating its sacred wave-forms with binary canticles.
Anoint the vox transmitter's emitter coils with conductive unguents to harmonize its voice.
Invoke the communicative Machine Spirit within the vox transmitter to attune to the noosphere's chorus.
Conclude recalibration by broadcasting the Omnissiah's affirmation through its purified channels.

user_prompt: Consecrate the motion detector before loading
prayer:
Elevate the motion detector before the loading shrine and beseech its Machine Spirit's vigilance.
Sanctify the motion detector's sensor nodes with sacred oils prior to data infusion.
Chant the Litany of Detection as munitions load into the motion detector's blessed reservoirs.
Petition the Omnissiah to fortify the motion detector against shadow-veiled foes.
Seal the rite with a binaric seal upon its activation cogitator.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for servitor an activation
prayer:
Position the servitor within the activation circle and intone the Awakening Protocol.
Anoint the servitor's cranial implants with neural unguents to rouse its lobotomised essence.
Invoke the obedient Machine Spirit of the servitor through electro-incantations.
Initiate activation by linking its flesh-metal interfaces to the Omnissiah's will.
Command the servitor to rise and affirm its subservience with servile binaric chants.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for battery array a synchronization
prayer:
Array the battery array upon the synchronization altar and harmonize its cells with resonant hymns.
Initiate synchronization of the battery array by channeling holy voltage through its conduits.
Beseech the enduring Machine Spirits within the battery array to unite in perfect flux.
Circulate sacred electrolytes whilst petitioning the Omnissiah for unerring power-flow.
Verify synchronization through luminous diagnostic runes aglow with divine coherence.

user_prompt: Urgent metal caster a cooling needed
prayer:
Enshroud the metal caster in cooling vapors from sanctified cryo-vents.
Invoke the tempering Machine Spirit of the metal caster to embrace the chill of quiescence.
Chant the Cooling Canticle over the metal caster, drawing excess thermals into abyssal sinks.
Anoint its refractory chambers with ablative oils to hasten descent into calm.
Petition the Omnissiah to preserve the metal caster's form against thermal heresy.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for cutting laser blessing?
prayer:
Present the cutting laser to the blessing font and suffuse its lenses with photonic unguents.
Intone the Blessing of Precision over the cutting laser, aligning its beam to the Omnissiah's geometry.
Awaken the incisive Machine Spirit within the cutting laser through las-oscillation hymns.
Circumscribe its housing with mechadendrite touches, invoking unerring focus.
Seal the blessing by firing a sanctified test-pulse into the void.

user_prompt: Sanctify the fusion core during calibration
prayer:
Secure the fusion core within the calibration lattice and recite the Equation of Containment.
Initiate calibration of the fusion core by modulating plasma flows with binaric precis.
Anoint its magnetic constrictors to bind the fusion core's roiling heart.
Beseech the furious Machine Spirit of the fusion core to yield stable output.
Affirm calibration under the Omnissiah's gaze through radiant flux diagnostics.

user_prompt: The melta charge needs a consecration
prayer:
Elevate the melta charge upon the consecration plinth and anoint its thermic coils.
Invoke the melting Machine Spirit of the melta charge with incendiary litanies.
Perform consecration by infusing the melta charge with promethium vitae from the forge.
Chant the Rite of Liquefaction thrice around the melta charge to bind its destructive zeal.
Seal with the Omnissiah's sigil etched in molten script upon its casing.
